go_runtime_scope: local/copied-DB-and-data orphan images cleanup candidate only
parity_scope: GET scans PRISM_GO_DATA_DIR/static/uploads image files and reports orphan_images, total_count, total_size_bytes, and total_size_mb
referenced originals protect matching same-extension and _thumb.webp thumbnail companions
references include Notes.content, Notes.cover_image, direct static/uploads attachments, and text attachment embedded images
DELETE requires filenames and rechecks that each target is still orphan before file mutation
DELETE removes true orphan original plus true orphan thumbnail companions
referenced files are reported as not orphan and are not deleted
media cleanup flag is explicit and does not authorize production files
